title: ourisia integrifolia
intro: Ourisia integrifolia, also known as the alpine forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family and is native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ourisia integrifolia include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
